posts.author: neha1101
posts.text: Quote of the day by John Bogle — “We deceive ourselves when we believe that past stock market return patterns provide the bounds by which we can predict the future” On first read of the quote by the legend, the inventor of Index Fund, I thought it was so contradictory. Only when i finished reading the entire article the true meaning came out. Rather than attempting to predict the market, Bogle advocated focusing on what investors can control: asset allocation, costs, and long-term commitment. Discipline, not prediction, forms the foundation of sustainable investing success. Believing that past…
